title: TreeTimber
body:
Highly optimized Minecraft mod that allows you to chop down entire trees with a single swing of your axe. No more tedious block-by-block breaking—take down trees instantly and streamline your survival experience!  

![TreeTimber Animation](https://cdn.pixabay.com/animation/2023/10/20/16/51/16-51-29-801_512.gif)  

---

## Features  

### Effortless Tree Chopping  
Break just one block of a tree, and the entire tree collapses instantly, dropping all logs.  

### Improved Tree Detection  
The mod now features an enhanced system for identifying trees, ensuring only complete trees are felled.  

### Shift Key Functionality  
Want more control? Hold down the **Shift** key while chopping to disable the automatic tree-felling feature, allowing you to chop individual blocks.  

### Realistic Durability  
Your axe's durability decreases based on the number of blocks broken, ensuring balanced gameplay.  

### Optimized Performance  
TreeTimber is lightweight and carefully optimized to minimize lag, making it ideal for any world, large or small.  

---

## Perfect For  

- Speeding up resource gathering in survival mode.  
- Enhancing gameplay without sacrificing balance.  
- Players looking for a smooth and performance-friendly mod.  

---

Take your woodcutting efficiency to the next level with **TreeTimber**—where speed meets optimization!  
This is not the final version of the mod; big updates are on the way!  

---
